nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for RisingWave Grafana dashboards covering how to generate dashboards from Python source, update dashboards without restarting Grafana, and configure multi-cluster deployments.

nodes.name: generate.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that invokes the Python dashboard generator to produce the Grafana dashboard JSON files for RisingWave.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python package requirements for the Grafana dashboard generation toolchain.

nodes.name: risingwave-dev-dashboard.json
nodes.summary: Generated Grafana dashboard JSON for RisingWave developer monitoring, containing panels, templating, and annotations for internal metrics visualization.
nodes.languageNotes: Stored as a single minified JSON line; generated by generate.sh from Python source.

nodes.name: risingwave-traces.json
nodes.summary: Grafana dashboard configuration for distributed tracing panels in RisingWave, with panels querying Tempo or Jaeger trace data sources.

nodes.name: risingwave-user-dashboard.json
nodes.summary: Generated Grafana dashboard JSON for RisingWave end-user metrics, providing a simplified monitoring view for operators.
nodes.languageNotes: Stored as a single minified JSON line; generated by generate.sh from Python source.

nodes.name: update.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that pushes updated Grafana dashboard JSON to a running Grafana instance via its HTTP API, enabling hot-reload of dashboards without restart.
